name: Rod's Golf Improvement Center
about: Rod's Golf Improvement Center is a facility focused on golf training and practice, featuring two indoor golf simulators and comprehensive instruction services. The center utilizes DeadSolid and Flightscope technology with E6 software to provide a realistic golfing experience year-round. Services include private and group lessons, club repair, custom fitting, and a pro shop for equipment. The venue is suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels, from beginners looking to learn basics to experienced players refining their technique.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art DeadSolid and Flightscope simulators with detailed swing analysis
Year-round weather-independent golf practice with advanced tracking technology
Comprehensive services including lessons, club repair, and custom fitting
Flexible lesson packages and group rates for different skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs as the venue doesn't explicitly mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, so bringing your own is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator time can be booked in advance with slots filling up quickly.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers golf lessons for all ages and skill levels, making it suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
